name: Pecan Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the first five ingredients with a fork until combined.
2. Use a knife to cut in the butter until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Stir the bananas, pecans, lemon peel, and eggs into the flour mixture until just moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into a lightly oiled 9-inch x 5-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan for at least 10 minutes before slicing.
